# requirements-optional.txt  (RECOMMENDED — generated by DEPENDENCY_AUDIT.md)
#
# Feature-specific deps that are imported LAZILY / GUARDED, so the app boots without them and
# the feature degrades gracefully. Install when you need the specific feature.
#
# Install (with core):  pip install -r requirements-core.txt -r requirements-optional.txt

# --- Face-recognition attendance (HR) ---
# PROOF: only an in-function `try: import face_recognition` at hr/attendance_views.py:471.
# Pulls dlib (needs cmake/build tools) + the model weights.
face-recognition==1.3.0
face-recognition-models==0.3.0
dlib==20.0.0

# --- HR document / template parsing ---
# PROOF: imported lazily inside a try-block (hr/serializers.py:275 -> hr/template_parser.py).
# pandas was in requirements.txt; PyPDF2 was only in requirements_pandas.txt;
# pdfplumber and python-docx were UNDECLARED anywhere (imported but missing) — added here.
pandas==2.3.3
PyPDF2>=3.0.0
pdfplumber>=0.10.0      # was UNDECLARED; pin a version your env validates
python-docx>=1.1.0      # was UNDECLARED (imported as `docx`); pin a validated version
